title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, November 08 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 09/11/2022
Image reference: 2022-11-09_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-november-08-2022_img1.png
Bulkers: Bulker values have softened
Capesize Edward N (176,200 DWT, Jan 2011, Shanghai Waigaoqiao Shipbuilding) committed to unknown German buyers for USD 25.25 mil, VV Value USD 24.98 mil - BWTS fitted. Capesize Aquafortune (174,700 DWT, Apr 2011, Namura) sold to undisclosed buyers for USD 27.00 mil, VV Value USD 27.51 mil - BWTS fitted. Ultramax Caro Padre (63,500 DWT, Dec 2012, Yangzhou Dayang Shipbuilding) sold to unknown Chinese buyers for USD 21.10 mil, VV Value USD 20.98 mil - SS Due.
